creator: alex@cichlids.com
text:
Thus spake John C. Archambeau (nxiv@my-deja.com):

> The Tekram DC-390F is not an AMD based SCSI adapter, it's an LSI Logic
> 53C875 based adapter which uses the ncr driver.

Yes, you're right, of course. I didn't notice the "F" :).

> Based on this behavior, I believe it's safe to close this bug report as
> being corrected in a later release.

OK, thank you.

Can someone close it, please?

Alex

-- 
I doubt, therefore I might be.
